name: Black Forest Cheesecake Delight (Kraft)
recipeInstructions:
To make the crust, combine the crumbs and margarine; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
To make the filling, combine cream cheese and sugar, mixing medium with an electric mixer until blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in the chocolate and almond extract, and pour over crust. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes. Loosen the cake from the rim of pan; cool before removing. Chill.
Top the cake with the pie filling and whipped topping just before serving.
